series_metadata.series_description: The bankruptcy files are BWC’s record of the proceedings of bankruptcy cases. The bankruptcy files contain correspondence and pleadings in bankruptcy actions in which the BWC is a party.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan original document into UDS, verify scanned image is readable, and ; Electronic: bankruptcy files are scanned into Universal Document Service (UDS). electronic version of bankruptcy files in UDS bankruptcy case closes. electronic version information will be reviewed every 3 years ensure that files can still be accessed
